title: Build a Tip Calculator 💰
description: Apply your knowledge of operators and variables to build a functional restaurant tip calculator.

questions.instruction: Declare a variable named `billAmount` and set it to 45.50.

validationRules.errorMessage: Make sure you declare billAmount using let or const and set it to 45.50.

questions.instruction: Declare a variable named `tipPercentage` and set it to 0.15 (for 15%).

validationRules.errorMessage: Declare tipPercentage using let or const and set it to 0.15.

questions.instruction: Calculate the tip by multiplying `billAmount` and `tipPercentage`, and store it in a variable named `tipAmount`.

validationRules.errorMessage: Multiply billAmount by tipPercentage and assign it to tipAmount.
Add billAmount and tipAmount together and store the result in totalBill.
